(T2D) Walking Support Provided CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: walking when most self sufficient - walking support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist
548 T2E T2E_PARA_BARS (T2E) Parallel Bars Used by Resident CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: walking when most self sufficient - parallel bars used. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
549 T3 T3MCARE_CALC_RUG (T3) Medicare
